care.summary: Popular beginner bonsai with thick exposed roots and glossy oval leaves.
care.water: Keep soil moist; never let dry out completely
care.soil: Bonsai soil mix with good drainage
care.fertilizer: Bonsai feed every 2 weeks during growing season
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic to pets if ingested
common_issues: Leaf drop from drafts or sudden changes
Aphids and scale on new growth
tips: Mist daily or place on a humidity tray
Prune new shoots to maintain shape
One of the hardiest indoor bonsai species
